description: Benchmark policy governing run completeness, gates, and claim readiness

correctness_gate.description: c_xxhsum and rust_xxhash_rs must agree on digest for measured xxHash scenarios

completeness.description: All canonical comparators must execute for every declared scenario

statistical_method.description: Median of measured samples after warmup

claim_readiness.description: A run is claim-ready only if all gates pass and the matrix is complete

latest_resolution.description: latest resolves only to the most recent complete, claim-ready run
